name: Hacker News (front page)
note: Mined via the HN Algolia API for each story's OUTBOUND url (Ask/text posts skipped). The HN discussion is never the item.

name: Hacker News (Show HN)
note: Show HN skews toward web toys / tools / standalone sites — strong one-off-gem source.

name: r/InternetIsBeautiful
note: Mined via reddit's .json for each post's OUTBOUND url (self-posts skipped). May 403 from datacenter IPs — isolated, non-fatal.

name: r/listentothis
note: Music finds (outbound to Bandcamp/YouTube/etc). Type classification + the music card arrive in R7-4.

name: Kottke
note: Long-running link blog — the outbound links in its posts ARE the gems. Self-domain + non-http links are dropped; mega-sites/liveness/type are the R7-2(c) funnel's job.

name: Web Curios
note: Dense weekly roundup of strange/beautiful sites — exactly what linked to moltbook.

name: ooh.directory
note: A hand-kept directory of personal blogs — its outbound site links are candidate gems.

name: Are.na — (add channel slug)
note: Mined via api.are.na for each block's source.url. Disabled until Kyle adds a real public channel slug (an empty/unknown slug 404s).
